mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Guardianship of Walter P. Castle, Until he reached 21 years of age 11.19.1902
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Guardianship of Walter P. Castle, Until he reached 21 years of age 11.19.1902 Henry Quesenberry, Guardian Recorded in Ledger Book 5, Page 248, in the Floyd County Courthouse
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
